creator: cvs-src@yandex.ru
text:
Hi Veniamin,

would you like to grab maintainership for this port? I talked with 
current maintainer about that at October 2012, and he told that this 
will depend on where he will work and that he will respond in couple of 
weeks. Since I never got any response it make me think that 
maintainership of this port may be transferred to you, since the all the 
recent updates to this port were provided by you.

-- 
Regards,
Ruslan

Tinderboxing kills... the drives.
